recommendations.title: Big Legend
recommendations.overview: An ex-soldier ventures into the Pacific Northwest to uncover the truth behind his fiance's disappearance.

recommendations.title: Maneater
recommendations.overview: A group of friends on vacation in a seeming island paradise are stalked by an unrelenting great white after an accident leaves them stranded and left for dead.

recommendations.title: Apache Junction
recommendations.overview: Apache Junction is an outpost of lawlessness, a haven for thieves and cold-blooded killers. After big-city reporter Annabelle Angel arrives to write an article on the town, she becomes a target when notorious gunslinger Jericho Ford comes to her aid.

recommendations.title: Slow West
recommendations.overview: In the Old West, a 17-year-old Scottish boy teams up with a mysterious gunman to find the woman with whom he is infatuated.

recommendations.title: How the West Was Won
recommendations.overview: The epic tale of the development of the American West from the 1830s through the Civil War to the end of the century, as seen through the eyes of one pioneer family.
recommendations.director: Henry Hathaway, John Ford, George Marshall

recommendations.title: Dead Birds
recommendations.overview: Towards the end of the Civil War, a group of Confederate soldiers hole up on an abandoned plantation after robbing a bank, and find themselves at the mercy of supernatural forces.

recommendations.title: The Wild Bunch
recommendations.overview: An aging group of outlaws look for one last big score as the "traditional" American West is disappearing around them.

recommendations.title: Cat Ballou
recommendations.overview: A woman seeking revenge for her murdered father hires a famous gunman, but he's very different from what she expects.

recommendations.title: Brimstone
recommendations.overview: In the menacing inferno of the old North-American West, Liz is a genuine survivor who is hunted by a vengeful preacher for a crime she didn’t commit.

recommendations.title: The Ballad of Buster Scruggs
recommendations.overview: Vignettes weaving together the stories of six individuals in the old West at the end of the Civil War. Following the tales of a sharp-shooting songster, a wannabe bank robber, two weary traveling performers, a lone gold prospector, a woman traveling
